hooks.command: echo "[scholar-assistant] 知识库路径: ${user_config.kb_path:-未配置，使用默认 ./knowledge-base/}"
if echo "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" | grep -q "knowledge-base"; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/generate_index.py" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/wiki/" 2>/dev/null; fi
echo "[scholar-assistant] 提示: 使用 /scholar-assistant:lint-kb 检查知识库健康状态"
